steps.title: User is prompted to place the...
steps.instruction: User is prompted to place the working plate pre-loaded with samples (100 μL per sample) on the Magnetic Module.

steps.title: Bead suspension (20 μL per well)...
steps.instruction: Bead suspension (20 μL per well) is transferred into the working plate.

steps.title: User is prompted to move the...
steps.instruction: User is prompted to move the working plate to the Heater Shaker Module.

steps.title: The samples undergo a 60-min incubation at 1000 rpm
steps.instruction: The samples undergo a 60-min incubation at 1000 rpm.

steps.title: User is prompted to move the...
steps.instruction: User is prompted to move the working plate to the Magnetic Module.

steps.title: The supernatant in each well is...
steps.instruction: The supernatant in each well is discarded while the magnet is engaged.

steps.title: The wash buffer (250 μL per...
steps.instruction: The wash buffer (250 μL per well) is added into the working plate and mixed.

steps.title: The supernatant in each well is...
steps.instruction: The supernatant in each well is discarded while the magnet is engaged.

steps.title: For 2 more washes, Step 7 and 8 are repeated
steps.instruction: For 2 more washes, Step 7 and 8 are repeated.

steps.title: Anti-Human IgG solution (100 μL per...
steps.instruction: Anti-Human IgG solution (100 μL per well) is added into the working plate.

steps.title: User is prompted to move the...
steps.instruction: User is prompted to move the working plate to the Heater Shaker Module.

steps.title: The samples undergo a 60-min incubation at 1000 rpm
steps.instruction: The samples undergo a 60-min incubation at 1000 rpm.

steps.title: User is prompted to move the...
steps.instruction: User is prompted to move the working plate to the Magnetic Module.

steps.title: The supernatant in each well is...
steps.instruction: The supernatant in each well is discarded while the magnet is engaged.

steps.title: The wash buffer (250 μL per...
steps.instruction: The wash buffer (250 μL per well) is added into the working plate and mixed.

steps.title: The supernatant in each well is...
steps.instruction: The supernatant in each well is discarded while the magnet is engaged.

steps.title: For 2 more washes, Step 15 and 16 are repeated
steps.instruction: For 2 more washes, Step 15 and 16 are repeated.

steps.title: TMB Substrate Solution (100 μL per...
steps.instruction: TMB Substrate Solution (100 μL per well) is added into the working plate.

steps.title: User is prompted to move the...
steps.instruction: User is prompted to move the working plate to the Heater Shaker Module.

steps.title: The samples undergo a 5-min incubation at 1000 rpm
steps.instruction: The samples undergo a 5-min incubation at 1000 rpm.

steps.title: User is prompted to move the...
steps.instruction: User is prompted to move the working plate to the Magnetic Module.

steps.title: Stop Solution (50 μL per well)...
steps.instruction: Stop Solution (50 μL per well) is added into the working plate.

steps.title: The supernatant (100 μL per well)...
steps.instruction: The supernatant (100 μL per well) in each well is transferred to the FINAL plate while the magnet is engaged.

steps.title: User is prompted to move the...
steps.instruction: User is prompted to move the FINAL plate to a microplate reader.
